query: SELECT id, title, type, source_url, file_link FROM assignments_library WHERE subject_slug='math' AND (title LIKE '%Line%' OR topic LIKE '%Line%' OR title LIKE '%Plot%' OR topic LIKE '%Plot%') LIMIT 5;
